attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
    DRVD.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT , 
    DRVD.BK_SS_CD , 
    DRVD.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD      , 
    DRVD.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY, 
    DRVD.DEFAULT_SC_FLG AS OLD_DEFAULT_SC_FLG, 
    WI.SLS_CREDIT_ASGNMT_SLS_TRX_KEY,
    WI.SLS_CREDIT_ASGNMT_MODE_CD,
    WI.SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT,
    WI.BK_SALES_REP_NUM,              
    WI.BK_SLS_TERR_ASGNMT_TYPE_CD,    
    WI.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,   
    WI.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,  
    WI.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,
    WI.SPLIT_PCT,
    WI.EFFECTIVE_START_DTM,
    WI.EFFECTIVE_END_DTM,
    WI.SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM,             
    WI.EDW_CREATE_DTM, 
    WI.EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
    WI.QUOTA_FLAG,
    WI.SBSCRPTN_ITEM_CHANGE_ID_INT,
    WI.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT , 
    WI.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT ,
    WI.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT,
	WI.WEB_ORDER_ID
   FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV DRVD
   INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
    ON DRVD.BK_SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ACCRUED_REV_TRX ACRL
    ON DRVD.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY=ACRL.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY	
   INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_ACRL_XAAS_TV WI
    ON (WI.SBSCRPTN_ITEM_CHANGE_ID_INT=ACRL.SK_LINE_REF_NUM
	AND WI.WEB_ORDER_ID=TRIM(ACRL.BK_WEB_ORDER_ID)
    AND WI.EFFECTIVE_END_DTM='3500-01-01 00:00:00')
   WHERE 
     DRVD.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD <> 'O'
     AND DRVD.FORWARD_REVERSE_CD = 'FORWARD'        
     AND DRVD.LAST_RECORD_FLG IN ('Y')  
     AND DRVD.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY=-999
	 AND DRVD.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY>0
	 AND DRVD.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY<0 /*TO QUALIFY ONLY PURE ACCRUALS WHERE AR_TRX_LINE_KEY INFO NOT AVAILABLE*/
    UNION ALL /*FOR QUALIFICATION OF NGCCRM DATA*/
   SELECT 
    DRVD.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT , 
    DRVD.BK_SS_CD , 
    DRVD.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD      , 
    DRVD.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY, 
    DRVD.DEFAULT_SC_FLG AS OLD_DEFAULT_SC_FLG, 
    WI.SLS_CREDIT_ASGNMT_SLS_TRX_KEY,
    WI.SLS_CREDIT_ASGNMT_MODE_CD,
    WI.SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT,
    WI.BK_SALES_REP_NUM,              
    WI.BK_SLS_TERR_ASGNMT_TYPE_CD,    
    WI.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,   
    WI.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,  
    WI.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,
    WI.SPLIT_PCT,
    WI.EFFECTIVE_START_DTM,
    WI.EFFECTIVE_END_DTM,
    WI.SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM,             
    WI.EDW_CREATE_DTM, 
    WI.EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
    WI.QUOTA_FLAG,
    WI.SBSCRPTN_ITEM_CHANGE_ID_INT,
    WI.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT , 
    WI.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT ,
    WI.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT,
	WI.WEB_ORDER_ID
   FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV DRVD
   INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
    ON DRVD.BK_SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
   INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_RAE_NET_REVENUE SRNR
    ON SRNR.NET_REVENUE_KEY=DRVD.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY
    AND SRNR.SS_CD=DRVD.BK_SS_CD
   INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_RAO_XXCFI_RAE_NET_REVENUE EOXRNR
     ON  EOXRNR.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID = SRNR.SK_NET_REVENUE_ID
	 AND EOXRNR.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID = SRNR.SCHEDULE_LINE_ID
     AND EOXRNR.GLOBAL_NAME=NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
   INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO
   ON DRVD.SALES_ORDER_KEY=NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY
   INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_ACRL_XAAS_TV WI
    ON (WI.SBSCRPTN_ITEM_CHANGE_ID_INT=EOXRNR.TSV_LINE_REF_NUM
	AND WI.WEB_ORDER_ID=NSO.BK_WEB_ORDER_ID
    AND WI.EFFECTIVE_END_DTM='3500-01-01 00:00:00') /*RECHECK*/
    WHERE 
     DRVD.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD <> 'O'
     AND DRVD.FORWARD_REVERSE_CD = 'FORWARD'        
     AND DRVD.LAST_RECORD_FLG IN ('Y')  
     AND DRVD.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY=-999   
	 AND DRVD.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY=-999
	 AND (EOXRNR.TSV_FLAG='Y' AND EOXRNR.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID<0)
	 AND DRVD.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD='RAE_REVENUE'

SELECT 
   DRVD.DV_REVENUE_FLG      ,          
   ROW_NUMBER()  OVER( ORDER BY WI.SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM ) /* + SM_MAX.MAX_TRX_SEQ_ID */ AS BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT ,
   DRVD.BK_SS_CD                      ,
   DRVD.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT * -1,
   DRVD.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT   * -1,
   DRVD.REBATE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT      ,
   DRVD.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD              ,
   DRVD.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD            ,
   DRVD.LINE_TYPE_CD                  ,
   DRVD.SPLIT_PCT    *-1               ,  
   DRVD.GL_DTM                        ,
   DRVD.GL_POSTED_DTM                 ,
   DRVD.RULE_START_DTM                ,
   'REVERSE' AS FORWARD_REVERSE_CD  ,
   'N' AS LAST_RECORD_FLG ,
   DRVD.DD_INVOICE_CURRENCY_CD        ,
   DRVD.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD     ,
   WI.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT AS DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT,
   WI.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT  AS DV_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT ,
   DRVD.REPORTING_MEASURE_TYPE        ,
   WI.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT AS DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT,
   DRVD.SALES_ORDER_KEY               ,
   DRVD.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
   DRVD.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
   DRVD.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           ,
   /* OA Q3FY14 */
   DRVD.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          ,
   DRVD.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               ,
   DRVD.AR_TRX_KEY                    ,
   DRVD.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY  ,
   DRVD.REPORTED_SALES_ORDER_NUM_INT  ,
   DRVD.PRODUCT_KEY                   ,
   DRVD.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD            ,
   DRVD.DV_CHARGES_FLG                ,
   DRVD.DV_CORP_REVENUE_FLG           ,
   DRVD.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG     ,
   DRVD.DV_MISC_FLG                   ,
   DRVD.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG       ,
   DRVD.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG             ,
   DRVD.DV_SERVICE_FLG                ,
   DRVD.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT *-1,
   DRVD.DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT *-1 ,
   DRVD.DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT  *-1 ,
   DRVD.DV_EXTENDED_QTY  *-1,
   DRVD.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY    ,
   DRVD.SERVICE_CONTRACT_FLG          ,
   DRVD.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM          ,
   DRVD.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD  ,
   DRVD.CUSTOMER_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM   ,
   DRVD.SHIPPED_DT                    ,
   DRVD.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD           ,
   DRVD.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY ,
   DRVD.DV_COMP_US_ORDER_LIST_PRC_AMT ,
   DRVD.INTERFACE_SOURCE_NAME         ,
   DRVD.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD        ,
   DRVD.MAJOR_LINE_FLG                ,
   DRVD.MAJOR_LINE_SALES_ORDER_LN_KEY ,
   DRVD.DD_CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CD,
   DRVD.SERVICE_TYPE_CD               ,
   DRVD.CM_ORIGINAL_INVOICE_DT        ,
   DRVD.DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT  *-1,
   DRVD.GL_POSTING_CONTROL_ID_INT  ,   
   DRVD.DD_SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CD     ,  
   DRVD.WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY  , 
   DRVD.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD          ,
   DRVD.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY           ,
   DRVD.SALES_ORDER_TYPE_NAME         ,
   DRVD.FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD            ,
   DRVD.BUNDLE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY   ,
   USER,
   CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0),
   USER,
   CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0),
   DRVD.SALES_REP_NUM                 ,
   WI.SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM       AS DV_FISCAL_DT,
   'I' AS NCR_TRANSACTION_REASON_CD,
   DRVD.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY,
   DRVD.DEFAULT_SC_FLG                ,
   DRVD.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT            ,
   DRVD.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD            ,
   DRVD.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD      ,
   DRVD.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY            ,
   DRVD.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT AS OLD_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID,
   'INSERT' AS EVENT_TYPE    ,
   DRVD.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY  , 
   DRVD.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME  , 
   DRVD.DV_TRX_AMT      , 
   DRVD.DV_FUNC_AMT ,
   DRVD.SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT,
   DRVD.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY ,/*added as a part of Q3FY16 SOT OA*/
   DRVD.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY,
   DRVD.TSV_ACCRUALS_CD
   FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV DRVD
   INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_ACRL_TX_XAAS_NONAPLD_SC_I WI
    ON  DRVD.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT = WI.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT
    AND DRVD.BK_SS_CD = WI.BK_SS_CD
    QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER ( PARTITION BY DRVD.BK_SS_CD , DRVD.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD      , DRVD.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY,   DRVD.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY , DRVD.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT
  ORDER BY WI.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT DESC)=1

SELECT
    DRVD.DV_REVENUE_FLG    ,            
    ROW_NUMBER()  OVER( ORDER BY WI.SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM ) AS BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT , 
    DRVD.BK_SS_CD                      ,
    CASE WHEN COALESCE(DRVD.SPLIT_PCT,100) =0 THEN DRVD.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT
     ELSE DRVD.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT * (  WI.SPLIT_PCT/ COALESCE(DRVD.SPLIT_PCT,100)) 
    END AS GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,
    
    CASE WHEN COALESCE(DRVD.SPLIT_PCT,100) =0 THEN DRVD.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT
     ELSE DRVD.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT * (  WI.SPLIT_PCT/ COALESCE(DRVD.SPLIT_PCT,100)) 
    END AS GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT,
    DRVD.REBATE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT      ,
    DRVD.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD              ,
    DRVD.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD            ,
    DRVD.LINE_TYPE_CD                  ,
    WI.SPLIT_PCT AS SPLIT_PCT,
    DRVD.GL_DTM                        ,
    DRVD.GL_POSTED_DTM                 ,
    DRVD.RULE_START_DTM                ,
    'FORWARD' AS FORWARD_REVERSE_CD  ,
    'Y' AS LAST_RECORD_FLG ,
    DRVD.DD_INVOICE_CURRENCY_CD        ,
    DRVD.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD     ,
    WI.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT AS DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT ,
    WI.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT  AS DV_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT ,
    DRVD.REPORTING_MEASURE_TYPE        ,
    WI.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT AS DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT,
    DRVD.SALES_ORDER_KEY               ,
    DRVD.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
    DRVD.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
    WI.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY  ,
    DRVD.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          ,
    DRVD.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               ,
    DRVD.AR_TRX_KEY                    ,
    DRVD.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY  ,
    DRVD.REPORTED_SALES_ORDER_NUM_INT  ,
    DRVD.PRODUCT_KEY                   ,
    WI.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE AS BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE  ,
    DRVD.DV_CHARGES_FLG                ,
    DRVD.DV_CORP_REVENUE_FLG           ,
    DRVD.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG     ,
    DRVD.DV_MISC_FLG                   ,
    DRVD.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG       ,
    DRVD.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG             ,
    DRVD.DV_SERVICE_FLG                ,
    
    CASE WHEN COALESCE(DRVD.SPLIT_PCT,100) =0 THEN DRVD.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT
     ELSE DRVD.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT  * (  WI.SPLIT_PCT/ COALESCE(DRVD.SPLIT_PCT,100))    
    END AS DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,
    
    CASE WHEN COALESCE(DRVD.SPLIT_PCT,100) =0 THEN DRVD.DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT
     ELSE DRVD.DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT  * (  WI.SPLIT_PCT/ COALESCE(DRVD.SPLIT_PCT,100)) 
    END AS DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT,
    
    CASE WHEN COALESCE(DRVD.SPLIT_PCT,100) =0 THEN  DRVD.DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT 
     ELSE DRVD.DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT   * (  WI.SPLIT_PCT/ COALESCE(DRVD.SPLIT_PCT,100))   
    END AS DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT ,
    
    CASE WHEN COALESCE(DRVD.SPLIT_PCT,100) =0 THEN DRVD.DV_EXTENDED_QTY
     ELSE DRVD.DV_EXTENDED_QTY   * (  WI.SPLIT_PCT/ COALESCE(DRVD.SPLIT_PCT,100)) 
    END AS DV_EXTENDED_QTY ,
    DRVD.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY    ,
    DRVD.SERVICE_CONTRACT_FLG          ,
    DRVD.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM          ,
    DRVD.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD  ,
    DRVD.CUSTOMER_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM   ,
    DRVD.SHIPPED_DT                    ,
    DRVD.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD           ,
    DRVD.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY ,
    DRVD.DV_COMP_US_ORDER_LIST_PRC_AMT ,
    DRVD.INTERFACE_SOURCE_NAME         ,
    DRVD.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD        ,
    DRVD.MAJOR_LINE_FLG                ,
    DRVD.MAJOR_LINE_SALES_ORDER_LN_KEY ,
    DRVD.DD_CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CD,
    DRVD.SERVICE_TYPE_CD               ,
    DRVD.CM_ORIGINAL_INVOICE_DT        ,
    CASE WHEN COALESCE(DRVD.SPLIT_PCT,100) =0 THEN  DRVD.DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT 
     ELSE DRVD.DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT  * (  WI.SPLIT_PCT/ COALESCE(DRVD.SPLIT_PCT,100))  
    END AS DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT ,
    DRVD.GL_POSTING_CONTROL_ID_INT     ,
    DRVD.DD_SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CD       ,
    DRVD.WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY   ,
    DRVD.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD          ,
    DRVD.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY           ,
    DRVD.SALES_ORDER_TYPE_NAME         ,
    DRVD.FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD            ,
    DRVD.BUNDLE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY   ,
    USER,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0),
    USER,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0),
    WI.BK_SALES_REP_NUM AS SALES_REP_NUM,
    WI.SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM       AS DV_FISCAL_DT,
    'I' AS NCR_TRANSACTION_REASON_CD,
    DRVD.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY,
    'N' AS DEFAULT_SC_FLG,
    WI.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT AS SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT,
    DRVD.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD,
    DRVD.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD      ,
    DRVD.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY            ,
    DRVD.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT AS OLD_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID,
    'INSERT' AS EVENT_TYPE   ,
    DRVD.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY , 
    DRVD.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME , 
    DRVD.DV_TRX_AMT     , 
    DRVD.DV_FUNC_AMT ,
    -999 AS SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT,
    DRVD.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY, /*added as a part of Q3FY16 SOT OA*/
    DRVD.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY,
    DRVD.TSV_ACCRUALS_CD
    FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV DRVD
       
    INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
     ON (DRVD.BK_SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
    
    INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_ACRL_TX_XAAS_NONAPLD_SC_I WI
     ON  DRVD.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT = WI.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT
     AND DRVD.BK_SS_CD = WI.BK_SS_CD
   QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER ( PARTITION BY DRVD.BK_SS_CD , DRVD.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD      , DRVD.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY,   DRVD.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY , WI.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT
  ORDER BY WI.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT DESC)=1
